overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} \hline \text {Fourier transform} & (f * g) (x) \equiv \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} f (x - y) g (y) d y \\ \text {Fourier series} & (f * g) (x) \equiv \int_ {0} ^ {1} f (x - y) g (y) d y \\ \text {DFT} & \text {If a = [a_{0},\ldots,a_{N - 1},0,\ldots,0]^{T} and} \\ & b = [ b _ {0}, \ldots , b _ {N - 1}, 0, \ldots , 0 ] ^ {T} \text {are 2N - vectors,} \\ & \text {then a*b\equiv c=[c_{0},\ldots,c_{2N - 1}]^{T} , where} \\ & c _ {k} = \sum_ {j = 0} ^ {k} a _ {j} b _ {k - j} \\ \hline \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} \hline \text {Fourier transform} & (f * g) (x) \equiv \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} f (x - y) g (y) d y \\ \text {Fourier series} & (f * g) (x) \equiv \int_ {0} ^ {1} f (x - y) g (y) d y \\ \text {DFT} & \text {If } a = [a_{0},\ldots,a_{N - 1},0,\ldots,0]^{T} \text { and} \\ & b = [ b _ {0}, \ldots , b _ {N - 1}, 0, \ldots , 0 ] ^ {T} \text { are } 2N \text {-vectors,} \\ & \text {then } a*b\equiv c=[c_{0},\ldots,c_{2N - 1}]^{T} \text {, where} \\ & c _ {k} = \sum_ {j = 0} ^ {k} a _ {j} b _ {k - j} \\ \hline \end{array}
